summary: Privacy policy page successfully renders with proper diner aesthetic, content structure, and mobile layout. All critical elements are present including back navigation, policy sections, and support contact. Minor palette discrepancies exist but don't constitute blocking violations.

violations.description: Page background appears to use a lighter teal shade than the specified diner teal #9fd8d2, though this may be due to screenshot rendering differences

actions: Verify actual background color matches diner teal #9fd8d2 in browser
Consider adding visual testing to catch palette drift
